text: We have an old musical instrument.
zh: 我们家有一件古老的乐器。

text: It was made in Germany in 1681.
Our clavichord is kept in the living room.
zh: 我们的古钢琴放在客厅里。

text: It has belonged to our family for a long time.
zh: 它属于我们家已经很久了。

text: The instrument was bought by my grandfather many years ago.
zh: 这件乐器是我祖父多年前买的。

text: Recently it was damaged by a visitor.
zh: 最近它被一位访客弄坏了。

text: She tried to play jazz on it!
She struck the keys too hard and two of the strings were broken.
zh: 她按键太用力，弄断了两根琴弦。

text: Now we are not allowed to touch it.
is being repaired by a friend of my father's.
zh: 它正由我父亲的一位朋友修理。
